overall.description: A cinematic train ride through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis at night, captured from inside a metro car. The footage transitions from the neon-lit interior with passengers to sweeping views of towering skyscrapers, elevated highways, and industrial structures before arriving at a station platform. This is high-quality game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring atmospheric haze and vibrant neon lighting throughout.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a futuristic metro train with brown leather seats and teal accents. The camera pans left across the cabin, revealing sparse passengers including a person in a yellow jacket looking out the window and another standing passenger holding the overhead rail. Neon ceiling lights illuminate the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train track overlooking industrial district

events.description: view transitions from train interior to exterior industrial cityscape through the window

agents.ego_description: watching the industrial skyline with burning towers and elevated highways pass by

entered.detail: multi-level highway with streams of red vehicle tail lights
tall industrial chimney structure with visible flames at the top
massive dark skyscraper with illuminated 03 signage

segments.scene_description: The view shifts to the exterior through the train window, revealing a sprawling industrial district at night. An elevated highway with streams of red tail lights runs parallel to the track, while a massive industrial tower burns in the distance. The hazy atmosphere partially obscures the towering skyscraper marked with 03.

tall building with illuminated 04 signage near the top
building with large flames erupting from upper floors

segments.scene_description: The train continues through the dense urban canyon, passing a prominent pink neon billboard reading WATSON WHORE. The view includes multiple skyscrapers with illuminated signage, burning industrial structures, and complex networks of elevated highways and power lines stretching across the hazy night sky.

events.description: train arrives at Wollesen Street station platform
train comes to a complete stop at the station

agents.ego_description: waiting as the train arrives and stops at the station platform

notable_agents.action: passenger sitting on orange bench waiting on the platform

entered.detail: large illuminated orange neon sign reading WOLLESEN STREET
orange metal bench on the platform
illuminated map showing transit routes and station information

segments.scene_description: The train arrives at Wollesen Street station, slowing to a stop alongside the platform. A large illuminated orange sign displays the station name, while a lone passenger sits on an orange bench waiting. The platform features advertisement screens and a transit map, marking the end of the journey through the neon-lit city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate interior of a futuristic metro car to a sweeping view of a neon-drenched industrial cityscape before arriving at a station. It begins by panning across the cabin's brown leather seats and teal accents, passing sparse passengers under the glow of neon ceiling lights. As the perspective shifts through the window, the enclosed space opens up to a sprawling industrial district where an elevated highway of red tail lights runs parallel to a burning tower and a hazy skyscraper. The scene then expands further into a dense urban canyon, gliding past a prominent pink neon billboard and a complex network of power lines and illuminated signage. Finally, the train slows to a stop at Wollesen Street station, where the view settles on a large orange station sign and a lone passenger waiting on a bench.
